title: Somebody in the corn
description: mod contains creepy guy and related things
body:
OMG it's ~~KoЯn~~ corn!
# what is this mod about? 🤨
This mod aims to add various monsters (mostly inspired by the band Korn) and additional items: monster loot, magic and technology, and even just fun items. The amount of content in the mod will increase as I have the mood and free time to develop it.

# content 👾
- _corn (plant)_ -
  It grows in small corn fields.
- _corn (ear)_ -
  may be dropped from its plant.
- _corn kernels_ -
  may be dropped from plant too.
- _boiled corn_ -
  cook a corn in furnace to get it.
- _popcorn_ -
  same thing, cook the kernels to get popcorn.
- _cornkeeper_ -
  tall spooky fella, who guards the corn fields. He drops cursed metal, cursed nuggets, corn and cursed heart.
- _cursed heart_ -
  needed for craft summon items.
- _cursed metal_ -
  turn it into 9 nuggets!
- _cursed nuggets_ -
  turn 9 nuggets into 1 ingot!
- _cursed corn_ -
  similar to the Notch apple, but in addition to the positive effects it also has negative ones.
- _cornkeeper germ_ -
  tap this on a hay block

# p.s.
made with MCreator
